title: Starboy
why_this_song: Starboy by The Weeknd (2016) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Look what you've done"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Look what you've done"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I'm a motherfucking starboy"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I'm a motherfucking starboy"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "House so empty, need a centerpiece"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "done" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: P1 cleaner than your church shoes, ah
Pull off in that Roadster SV, ah
Bought mama a crib and a brand-new wagon

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Milli' point two just to hurt you, ah
Cut that ivory into skinny pieces
Girls get loose when they hear this song

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Starboy" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Starboy"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Weeknd one question about "Starboy", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Weeknd sobre "Starboy", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Starboy" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Starboy" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
